parameters.text:
={{ 'Classify this customer email for Metabelly (Croatian supplement brand).

Subject: ' + $json.subject + '
From: ' + $json.from + '
Body: ' + $json.bodySnippet + '

Respond with ONLY valid JSON, no other text:
{"category": "ORDER|FAQ|MEDICAL|BUSINESS|URGENT", "priority": "P1|P2|P3", "summary": "one sentence summary in English", "language": "HR|EN|OTHER"}' }}

options.systemPromptTemplate: You are Luka, an email classifier for Metabelly. Categories: ORDER (order/shipping/payment), FAQ (product questions, ingredients, dosage), MEDICAL (health conditions, symptoms, medication - always P1), BUSINESS (wholesale, partnerships, B2B), URGENT (distress, emergency). Priority: P1=urgent/medical, P2=needs human, P3=can auto-reply. Return only valid JSON.
